title: New India Assurance Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: New India Assurance Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with New India Assurance Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Ahmedabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About New India Assurance Advisory Limited:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance Advisory Limited!
